edits.note: Backdrop -> scrim token (drop the 2px blur, AC#6). Rogue z 99999990 mapped onto modal tier (9999995 = --z-modal). Kill ui-monospace shell font for cross-font consistency; tabular-nums for icon/digit alignment.

Floating-card shell (1.5): surface-panel bg + 1px border-strong + 8px radius + single 0 8px 24px scrim shadow. Drop the bespoke #0a0a0b, the amber border, the amber accent-ring 2nd shadow, and the 4px radius. var(--bb-amber) removed — forbidden in inline cssText.
Input row = surface-sunken well (AC#1). Replace the amber-tinted divider with the normal border token and drop the bespoke #13130f/#0a0a0b gradient.
CMD label -> accent token (interactive chrome). 11px caps at canonical .04em tracking / 600 weight (label-caps step 1.2). var(--bb-amber) removed.

edits.oldString: '<input id="gam-cmdk-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a command or filter…" aria-label="Filter commands" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false" style="flex:1;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:#e8e6e1;font:13px ui-monospace,JetBrains Mono,monospace">' +
edits.newString: '<input id="gam-cmdk-input" type="text" placeholder="Filter actions — e.g. ban, modmail, intel…" aria-label="Filter commands" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false" style="flex:1;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:'+GAM_TOK.ink+';font:13px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,\'Segoe UI\',system-ui,sans-serif">' +
edits.note: 13px body input on the sunken well, ink text. Specific placeholder (AC#1) replaces the generic one. aria-label="Filter commands" (locked accessible name) UNCHANGED; #gam-cmdk-input id preserved. Kill ui-monospace.
ESC hint -> bordered key-cap chip (surface-overlay bg + border, AC#5). ink-faint #7a7672 promoted to ink-muted per 1.1 (all tertiary text routes to ink-muted).

edits.newString:
'
' +
edits.note: Add gam-cmdk-scroll class hook so the injected <style> can token-style the scrollbar (inline ::-webkit-scrollbar is impossible). #gam-cmdk-list id + role + aria-label (locked accessible name) UNCHANGED.

edits.newString:
'
' + '↑↓ navigate ⏎ execute' + 'Ctrl+Shift+P' + '
' +
edits.note: Footer on surface-panel (AC#5), 11px caps ink-muted. ↑↓ and ⏎ rendered as bordered key-cap chips (surface-overlay bg + border) instead of bare unicode. amber border-top + ink-faint #7a7672 retired.

Inject a once-only <style> (var(--gam-tok-*) is safe in <style>) for the accent-line scrollbar thumb (AC#6). Idempotent via #gam-cmdk-scroll-style guard. Anchored on the stable appendChild + querySelector pair.

edits.newString:
empty.style.cssText = 'padding:14px 16px;color:'+GAM_TOK.inkMuted+';font-size:12px;text-align:center;font-style:italic';
        empty.textContent = q ? ('No commands match "' + q + '" — try fewer words') : 'No commands match — try fewer words';
edits.note: Empty state on ink-muted (never ink-faint, AC#4), centered 12px, actionable copy. ink-faint #7a7672 retired.

Selected row = full-weight indicator (AC#2): accent-soft fill + 2px accent left-rail + bright ink. Replaces the low-contrast 0.07 tint with the canonical accent-soft (0.10). var(--bb-amber) removed (forbidden inline).
Icon gutter -> fixed 20px tabular (AC#3, was 16px) for cross-emoji alignment, accent color. Selected row scrollIntoView on keyboard nav (AC#2 'scrolls into view'). var(--bb-amber) removed.

summary: WP-11 command-palette: migrated every hardcoded hex/rgba and var(--bb-amber) literal in _apEnsure + _apRender to GAM_TOK string-concat (zero literals remain in the component). Floating-card shell (surface-panel + border-strong + 8px radius + single 0 8px 24px scrim shadow), input row on a surface-sunken well with a specific placeholder, full-weight selected row (accent-soft fill + 2px accent left-rail + bright ink) with scrollIntoView on keyboard nav, 20px tabular icon gutter, actionable ink-muted empty state, surface-panel footer with bordered Esc/↑↓/⏎ key-cap chips, an injected once-only <style> for the accent-line thin scrollbar, and the rogue z 99999990 collapsed onto the modal tier (9999995) with the 2px backdrop blur dropped for the scrim token. All locked ids/roles/aria accessible-name attrs preserved; node --check safe (pure string edits).
